wealth.name: Dhana Yoga
wealth.condition: Lords of 2nd and 11th conjunct or mutually aspecting
wealth.timing: Activated in dasha of 2nd or 11th lord

wealth.name: Lakshmi Yoga
wealth.condition: Lord of 9th in own or exaltation sign in Kendra (1/4/7/10)
wealth.effect: Great fortune, grace, abundant blessings, Lakshmi's grace

wealth.name: Kubera Yoga
wealth.effect: Exceptional wealth, financial mastery, money flows easily

wealth.name: Chandra Mangal Yoga
wealth.condition: Moon and Mars conjunct or mutually aspecting
wealth.effect: Wealth through real estate, property, or mother's side

career.name: Raja Yoga
career.condition: Kendra lord (1/4/7/10) conjunct or mutually aspecting Trikona lord (1/5/9)
career.effect: Authority, status, leadership, royal treatment, recognition

career.name: Hamsa Yoga
career.condition: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in Kendra
career.effect: Wisdom, teaching ability, spiritual authority, purity of character

career.name: Malavya Yoga
career.condition: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in Kendra
career.effect: Luxury, artistic mastery, charm, magnetic personality, comfort

career.name: Sasa Yoga
career.condition: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exaltation (Libra) in Kendra
career.effect: Discipline, mass leadership, enduring legacy, political power

career.name: Ruchaka Yoga
career.condition: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation (Capricorn) in Kendra
career.effect: Warrior qualities, athletic achievement, courage, military success

career.name: Bhadra Yoga
career.condition: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in Kendra
career.effect: Intellectual excellence, business acumen, communication mastery

career.name: Amala Yoga
career.condition: Benefic planet in 10th from Lagna or Moon (no malefic)
career.effect: Fame, good reputation, lasting name, virtuous livelihood

relationships.name: Kalathra Yoga
relationships.condition: Strong Venus + 7th lord well-placed, no malefic aspect
relationships.effect: Happy marriage, devoted spouse, harmonious relationship

relationships.name: Strong Darakaraka
relationships.condition: Darakaraka (lowest degree planet) in own/exalt sign or Kendra
relationships.effect: Supportive, compatible spouse with good character

spiritual.name: Pravrajya Yoga
spiritual.condition: 4 or more planets in one sign
spiritual.effect: Renunciation tendency, monastic leanings, deep spiritual path
spiritual.caution: Can indicate leaving worldly life — frame sensitively

spiritual.name: Ketu-Jupiter Conjunction
spiritual.effect: Deep spiritual wisdom, past-life knowledge, liberation path

spiritual.name: Viparita Raja Yoga
spiritual.condition: Lords of 6th, 8th, 12th in each other's signs or conjunct
spiritual.effect: Rise through adversity, success from others' misfortune, hidden power

spiritual.name: Moksha Yoga
spiritual.condition: Strong 12th lord + Ketu in Kendra or Trikona
spiritual.effect: Liberation tendency, spiritual awakening, foreign settlement

challenging.name: Kemadruma Yoga
challenging.condition: Moon with no planets in 2nd or 12th from it (adjacent signs)
challenging.effect_raw: Emotional isolation, lack of support, poverty tendency
challenging.effect_safe: A tendency toward emotional self-reliance — learning to find security from within rather than depending on others
cancellation: Another planet in Kendra from Lagna or Moon
challenging.timing: Moon dasha or Saturn over Moon
challenging.language_rule: NEVER say 'poverty' or 'total isolation'. Frame as inner journey.

challenging.name: Grahan Yoga
challenging.condition: Sun or Moon conjunct Rahu or Ketu (within 10 degrees)
challenging.effect_raw: Eclipsed luminaries, father/mother wound, blocked consciousness
challenging.effect_safe: An invitation to do the deep inner work of clearing ancestral and karmic patterns that eclipse your natural light
cancellation: Jupiter conjunct or aspecting Moon/Sun in same yoga
challenging.remedy_action: Daily Sun/Moon mantra, psychological healing work
challenging.language_rule: Frame as 'karmic clearing pattern' not 'damaged mind/soul'

challenging.name: Shakata Yoga
challenging.condition: Moon in 6th, 8th, or 12th house from Jupiter
challenging.effect_safe: A dynamic life path with significant highs and lows — the lesson is inner equanimity through all cycles
challenging.remedy_action: Jupiter remedies, building savings, equanimity practice
challenging.language_rule: Frame as 'cyclical nature of fortune' — empowering not fatalistic

challenging.name: Vish Yoga
challenging.condition: Saturn and Moon conjunct in same sign
challenging.effect_safe: Deep emotional sensitivity that, when worked with consciously, becomes profound wisdom and empathy
challenging.remedy_action: Therapy, Moon remedies, Saturn remedies, community support
challenging.language_rule: ⚠️ ALWAYS add professional mental health resource. Frame as 'emotional depth requiring support'

challenging.name: Daridra Yoga
challenging.condition: Lords of 2nd or 11th in 6th/8th/12th, or debilitated
challenging.effect_safe: Financial challenges that teach resourcefulness, generosity, and non-attachment to material security
cancellation: Neecha Bhanga of the debilitated planet
challenging.language_rule: Frame as 'financial growth opportunity' not 'destined poverty'
